subcodes.first_line: O steadfast leaf! Thy letter hath been received. Thou didst commence to lament and wail over thy deprivation from visiting the Sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه نامه ات رسید بسبب حرمان از زیارت عتبه مقدسه ناله و حنین آغاز نمودی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @consolation and comfort
